name: studio-ontology
description: FDE pipeline — compile business analysis into a runnable digital-intelligent ontology (clife-onto-engine five-element schema: Object / Link / Function / Rule / Action). Bridges DDD domain modeling (event storm, bounded contexts, behavior matrix) to an executable OAG ontology plugin. Consumes studio-insight / studio-planner artifacts; emits a clife-onto-engine plugin (schema YAML + rule/action handler skeletons + mapping + CQ).
